message:
feat(fsfs): pressure-aware backoff, redaction hardening, and repro diagnostic expansion

- pressure.rs: expanded pressure monitoring with configurable backoff
  thresholds, graceful degradation paths, and metric emission (+46 lines)
- redaction.rs: hardened PII redaction pipeline with additional pattern
  coverage and edge-case handling for partial matches (+43 lines)
- repro.rs: expanded reproducibility diagnostics with deterministic
  snapshot capture, diff-aware state comparison, and richer trace
  metadata for debugging non-deterministic search results (+59 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
